description: Weighted inspection ledger for Structure-D/RLL scientific-operational readiness. Scores are diagnostic and do not authorize claims.

score_scale.evidence: 0.0 absent, 0.25 documented, 0.50 implemented, 0.75 tested, 1.0 externally/operationally verified
score_scale.operation: 0.0 not executable, 0.25 planned/manual, 0.50 script exists, 0.75 tests/scaffold exist, 1.0 executed and verified
score_scale.risk_control: 0.0 no control, 0.50 partial control, 1.0 explicit gate/control
score_scale.risk_severity: 0.0 low consequence, 1.0 critical consequence if wrong or overclaimed

items.label: Current canonical joint real-data smoke result
items.knowledge_note: Real-data smoke comparison exists for LCDM, wCDM, CPL and RLL; claim remains blocked.

items.label: Explicit claim boundary and TOKEN_VAZIO policy
items.knowledge_note: Prevents smoke, synthetic or partial evidence from becoming overclaim.

items.label: Safe output-stem wrapper for robust-fit artifacts
items.knowledge_note: Mitigates canonical-result overwrite during future robust fits.

items.label: CI dependency installation and Python version fix
items.knowledge_note: Fixes missing numpy/pandas/PyYAML false failures; PASS still needs confirmation.

items.label: Effective dynamics analyzer: E/H/rho_DE/w_eff/q/D_C/logit
items.knowledge_note: Enables functional comparison beyond AIC/BIC without running a new fit.

items.label: Generate effective-dynamics CSV/manifest outputs
items.knowledge_note: Structure exists; derived artifacts still need execution.

items.label: Robust fits seeds 1..10 with maxiter >= 100
items.knowledge_note: Critical before any final ranking or claim review.

items.label: Dataset ablation matrix
items.knowledge_note: Defines tests but does not yet execute them.

items.label: RLL w_eff(z) vs CPL w(z) comparator
items.knowledge_note: Effective dynamics analyzer exists; explicit RLL-vs-CPL comparator still pending.

items.label: GEDE/emergent dark-energy baseline
items.knowledge_note: Required because RLL is semantically closest to transition/emergent dark energy.

items.label: Pantheon+ complete integration in joint likelihood
items.knowledge_note: Needed for broad late-time expansion constraints.

items.label: Full/completed CMB compressed covariance treatment
items.knowledge_note: CMB shift exists as partial compressed information; full covariance gate remains open.

items.label: Posterior inference / MCMC / nested sampling
items.knowledge_note: Required for uncertainty, identifiability and evidence-level model comparison.
